steps.t: The Ordâkhai camp of Khomar Bóha is to the north-west of the waggon in which you arrived.
Onúkho is in the centre of Khomar Bóha. Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#00FF00>LOW</rgb>.
You should see what is being stored in the amphorae located on the eastern side of Khomar Bóha. Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#00FF00>LOW</rg…
A map just to the north seems promising. Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#FFFF00>MEDIUM</rgb>.
Jóla has caught you examining the map of Sûg Nidar, and she demands to hear your explanation! Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#FF0000>HIGH</rgb…
You have no choice but to go inside the central tent of Khomar Bóha. Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#FF0000>HIGH</rgb>.
The Temámir Habâti has set up a shop for the Ordâkhai in the central tent of Khomar Bóha. Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#FFFF00>MEDIUM</rgb&g…
You should walk calmly out of Khomar Bóha without arousing further suspicion. Your Suspicion Level is: <rgb=#00FF00>LOW</rgb>.
Rahâzi is outside the Ordâkhai camp of Khomar Bóha.
